domain.name: travel
domain.description: Trip planning and itineraries for city visits and vacations.

task.name: toronto_5day_trip
task.title: 5-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A paced 5-day itinerary covering Toronto's highlights: museums, neighborhoods, waterfront, islands, and local food.

schema.name: itinerary
schema.description: A day-by-day travel itinerary with ordered days and activities.

root_fields.title: 5-Day Toronto Trip
root_fields.summary: A balanced 5-day plan mixing major attractions, neighborhood exploration, island time, and local dining with relaxed pacing.

fields.note: Easy first day to get oriented and adjust to the city.

fields.name: Arrival and hotel check-in
fields.description: Settle into accommodation, drop bags, quick rest.

fields.name: CN Tower & Harbourfront walk
fields.description: Visit CN Tower (optional EdgeWalk view) then stroll the waterfront and Queens Quay.

fields.name: Dinner at a waterfront restaurant
fields.description: Choose a casual spot with lake views to unwind.

fields.note: Culture-focused day with indoor options in case of rain.

fields.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
fields.description: Explore natural history and world cultures exhibits.

fields.name: Lunch on Bloor or Yorkville cafe
fields.description: Light lunch in the upscale Yorkville or nearby cafes.

fields.name: Distillery District stroll and shops
fields.description: Historic brick-lined district with galleries, boutiques, and craft beer.

fields.note: A relaxed day with outdoor time and scenic views.

fields.name: Ferry to Toronto Islands
fields.description: Short ferry ride to the Islands for walking, biking, or beach time.

fields.name: Picnic or cafe on the Islands
fields.description: Bring or buy a casual lunch and relax by the water.

fields.name: Return and dinner in the Entertainment District
fields.description: Try a trendy restaurant or gastropub near King St.

fields.note: Explore local markets, murals, and diverse food options.

fields.name: Kensington Market wander
fields.description: Vintage shops, street art, and eclectic markets.

fields.name: Lunch in Chinatown
fields.description: Savor dumplings, noodles, and bubble tea.

fields.name: Art gallery or Graffiti Alley photo walk
fields.description: Visit local galleries or photograph murals in the Fashion District.

fields.note: Wrap up with a market visit and flexible time before departure.

fields.name: St. Lawrence Market visit
fields.description: Sample local foods, grab souvenirs, and browse specialty stalls.

fields.name: Optional afternoon: Hockey Hall of Fame or shopping on Queen
fields.description: Choose an attraction based on interest and time before heading to airport or station.

fields.name: Departure
fields.description: Return to accommodation, collect luggage, and travel to airport or train station.

user_facing.title: 5-Day Toronto Trip Plan
user_facing.overview: A relaxed 5-day schedule that balances major sights, neighborhood discovery, island time, and local food recommendations.

sections.title: Day 1 — Arrival & Waterfront
sections.summary: Settle in and take an easy waterfront stroll with skyline views.
bullets: Check into your hotel and get oriented
Visit CN Tower area and walk Queens Quay
Dinner with lake views to unwind

sections.title: Day 2 — Museums & Distillery
sections.summary: Culture day: major museum in the morning and the historic Distillery District in the afternoon.
bullets: Royal Ontario Museum exhibits
Lunch near Yorkville
Evening in the Distillery District

sections.title: Day 3 — Toronto Islands
sections.summary: Relax on the Toronto Islands with ferry rides, beaches, and easy cycling or walking.
bullets: Morning ferry for skyline views
Picnic or island cafe for lunch
Return for dinner in the Entertainment District

sections.title: Day 4 — Kensington & Chinatown
sections.summary: Explore eclectic Kensington Market, enjoy Chinatown eats, and see local street art.
bullets: Browse vintage shops and vendors
Authentic lunch in Chinatown
Afternoon art walk or gallery visit

sections.title: Day 5 — Market & Departure
sections.summary: Finish with St. Lawrence Market, optional quick attraction, then head home.
bullets: Sample treats and souvenirs at St. Lawrence Market
Choose a final attraction or shopping stop
Allow time to collect luggage and travel to the airport

domain.name: travel
domain.description: Trip planning and itineraries for city visits and vacations.

task.name: toronto_5day_trip
task.title: 5-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A paced 5-day itinerary covering Toronto's highlights: museums, neighborhoods, waterfront, islands, and local food.

task_schema.name: itinerary_cs4
task_schema.description: A day-by-day travel itinerary with ordered days and activities.
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Itinerary
- Node types: Itinerary, Day, Activity
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: travel_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Travel_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

display.domain_schema:
name: travel_domain
description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Travel_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `--\
  \ TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Travel_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: itinerary_cs4
description: A day-by-day travel itinerary with ordered days and activities.
hierarchy: "Itinerary (root)\n    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)\n       \
  \ `-- Activity (leaf)"
nodes:
  Itinerary:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Day
  Day:
    type: container
    fields:
    - theme
    - note
    children:
    - Activity
    index_attr: index
  Activity:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - type
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
data_files:
  toronto_5day_trip: memory/travel/toronto_5day_trip.xml
default_data: toronto_5day_trip
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_itinerary_cs4.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Itinerary

  - Node types: Itinerary, Day, Activity

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Itinerary_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>5 days travel plan in Toronto</conversation_history>
    <Itinerary>
      <title>5-Day Toronto Trip</title>
      <summary>A balanced 5-day plan mixing major attractions, neighborhood exploration, island time, and local dining with relaxed pacing.</summary>
      <Day index="1">
        <theme>Arrival + Downtown Highlights</theme>
        <note>Easy first day to get oriented and adjust to the city.</note>
        <Activity>
          <name>Arrival and hotel check-in</name>
          <time_block>Morning - Early Afternoon</time_block>
          <type>logistics</type>
          <description>Settle into accommodation, drop bags, quick rest.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>smooth check-in</highlight>
            <highlight>map orientation</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>CN Tower & Harbourfront walk</name>
          <time_block>Late Afternoon</time_block>
          <type>sightseeing</type>
          <description>Visit CN Tower (optional EdgeWalk view) then stroll the waterfront and Queens Quay.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>city skyline views</highlight>
            <highlight>waterfront promenade</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Dinner at a waterfront restaurant</name>
          <time_block>Evening</time_block>
          <type>dining</type>
          <description>Choose a casual spot with lake views to unwind.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>local seafood options</highlight>
            <highlight>sunset over lake</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
      </Day>
      <Day index="2">
        <theme>Museums and Historic Distillery</theme>
        <note>Culture-focused day with indoor options in case of rain.</note>
        <Activity>
          <name>Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <type>museum</type>
          <description>Explore natural history and world cultures exhibits.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>dinosaur gallery</highlight>
            <highlight>special exhibits</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Lunch on Bloor or Yorkville cafe</name>
          <time_block>Midday</time_block>
          <type>dining</type>
          <description>Light lunch in the upscale Yorkville or nearby cafes.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>bistro options</highlight>
            <highlight>people-watching</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Distillery District stroll and shops</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon - Early Evening</time_block>
          <type>neighborhood</type>
          <description>Historic brick-lined district with galleries, boutiques, and craft beer.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Victorian industrial architecture</highlight>
            <highlight>artisan shops</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
      </Day>
      <Day index="3">
        <theme>Islands and Relaxation</theme>
        <note>A relaxed day with outdoor time and scenic views.</note>
        <Activity>
          <name>Ferry to Toronto Islands</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <type>transportation</type>
          <description>Short ferry ride to the Islands for walking, biking, or beach time.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>panoramic skyline views</highlight>
            <highlight>beaches and bike paths</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Picnic or cafe on the Islands</name>
          <time_block>Midday</time_block>
          <type>dining</type>
          <description>Bring or buy a casual lunch and relax by the water.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>laid-back atmosphere</highlight>
            <highlight>picnic spots</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Return and dinner in the Entertainment District</name>
          <time_block>Evening</time_block>
          <type>dining</type>
          <description>Try a trendy restaurant or gastropub near King St.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>vibrant nightlife</highlight>
            <highlight>diverse cuisine</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
      </Day>
      <Day index="4">
        <theme>Neighborhoods: Kensington + Chinatown</theme>
        <note>Explore local markets, murals, and diverse food options.</note>
        <Activity>
          <name>Kensington Market wander</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <type>neighborhood</type>
          <description>Vintage shops, street art, and eclectic markets.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>unique boutiques</highlight>
            <highlight>street vendors</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Lunch in Chinatown</name>
          <time_block>Midday</time_block>
          <type>dining</type>
          <description>Savor dumplings, noodles, and bubble tea.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>authentic eats</highlight>
            <highlight>affordable options</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Art gallery or Graffiti Alley photo walk</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <type>culture</type>
          <description>Visit local galleries or photograph murals in the Fashion District.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>street art</highlight>
            <highlight>gallery exhibitions</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
      </Day>
      <Day index="5">
        <theme>Final Day: Markets and Farewell</theme>
        <note>Wrap up with a market visit and flexible time before departure.</note>
        <Activity>
          <name>St. Lawrence Market visit</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <type>market</type>
          <description>Sample local foods, grab souvenirs, and browse specialty stalls.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>peameal bacon sandwich</highlight>
            <highlight>artisan products</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Optional afternoon: Hockey Hall of Fame or shopping on Queen</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <type>optional</type>
          <description>Choose an attraction based on interest and time before heading to airport or station.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>sports history</highlight>
            <highlight>last-minute shopping</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
        <Activity>
          <name>Departure</name>
          <time_block>Evening (as scheduled)</time_block>
          <type>logistics</type>
          <description>Return to accommodation, collect luggage, and travel to airport or train station.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>allow transit time</highlight>
            <highlight>confirm pickup/transport</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Activity>
      </Day>
    </Itinerary>
  </Itinerary_Version>
</Root>
